Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Electronic Warfare aircraft carry powerful jamming equipment which can be aimed down an axis to jam any enemy tracks within the purple cone that appears on the map.

To jam a track or an area, use the 'Offensive ECM' weapon available on EW aircraft and then right click on an enemy track or an area of the Tactical Display to jam. Jammed units will show a small 'sun' icon next to their track indicating they are being jammed.
EW aircraft can also carry Anti-Radar Missiles (ARM) which can be used to target enemy radars. Note that enemy radars must be actively emitting to be targeted with anti-radar missiles!
